# tests/skips.txt
# Format: <TestClass>.<test_method>
#
# Tests listed here are skipped when running the vendored CPython 3.14 test suite.
# Auto-generated from CI failure data (2026-07-09).
#
# Skip matching walks the MRO — PathTest.test_foo also skips
# WindowsPathTest.test_foo and PosixPathTest.test_foo.
#
# Remove entries as features are implemented in pathlibrs.
# Each section corresponds to a Phase 2+ feature gap.

# -- CompatiblePathTest — path-like protocol compat

# -- PurePathSubclassTest — subclass init chain differences
PurePathSubclassTest.test_as_bytes_common
PurePathSubclassTest.test_as_posix_common

PurePathSubclassTest.test_bytes_exc_message
